achievements.title: Purple Monopoly
achievements.description: Own Mediterranean Avenue and Baltic Avenue at the same time (No mortgages, prepared game or timed game)
achievements.author: LiveFastCyYoung

achievements.title: Purple Monopoly Fully Populated
achievements.description: Own four houses each on Mediterranean Avenue and Baltic Avenue each at the same time (No prepared or timed game)
achievements.author: LiveFastCyYoung

achievements.title: Purple Monopoly With Lodging
achievements.description: Own a hotel on each of Mediterranean Avenue and Baltic Avenue each at the same time (No prepared or timed game)
achievements.author: LiveFastCyYoung
